title: Study :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Find out about visas that let you study in New Zealand. If you are an education provider, learn about the rules for bringing students to New Zealand.
- Fee Paying Student Visa
- Post Study Work Visa
- Study with New Zealand
- Register interest in studying in New Zealand
- Study visas Learn about the visas you can study on while in New Zealand, and who can help you with your application.
Learn about the visas you can study on while in New Zealand, and who can help you with your application.
- Once you have a student visa Find out about working on a student visa, and how to check or change the conditions of your visa.

## Once you have a student visa
Find out about working on a student visa, and how to check or change the conditions of your visa.
- After you finish your study Find out about staying in New Zealand to work after you finish your study.

## After you finish your study
Find out about staying in New Zealand to work after you finish your study.
- For education providers Learn the rules for approved education providers, and how to attract international students and apply on their behalf. Find out about processing times for applications.

## For education providers
Learn the rules for approved education providers, and how to attract international students and apply on their behalf. Find out about processing times for applications.
